ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was reported */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference in demographic value from previous period */,
  "trend" REAL /* Trend of demographic value over time */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual demographic value */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "data_confidence_level" REAL /* Data confidence level */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES demographic_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 15-34, 35-54) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 15-24, 25-34) */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the age group */,
  "percentage_of_total_population" REAL /* Percentage of total population in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic metric (e.g., population size, growth rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the demographic metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit (e.g., people, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., census, survey, administrative data) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access */,
  "access_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "visualization_settings" TEXT /* Settings for the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparison) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, alert, reminder) */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., general, security, notifications) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., system, user, data) */,
  "audit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
